summary: Iteration 173: Unified Vendor Onboarding + Catalog Workspace testing complete. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend tests verified: 5-step onboarding form (Market→Details→Role→Capabilities→Review), country selector with automatic phone prefix change, role selector with marketplace/task-only badges, full onboarding flow with invite generation, and catalog workspace with stats and tabs.
seed_data_creation: Created test vendors during testing with unique emails (test.vendor.product.*, test.vendor.service.*, test.e2e.vendor.*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Onboarding Pack fully verified. Key findings: (1) GET /api/admin/vendor-onboarding/markets returns 6 markets (TZ/KE/UG/RW/NG/ZA) with phone prefixes and currencies, (2) GET /api/admin/vendor-onboarding/market-context/{code} returns market defaults (phone_prefix, currency_code, support_email, tax_id_label), (3) GET /api/admin/vendor-onboarding/role-preview?capability_type=X returns vendor permissions - products/promo/multi→can_access_marketplace_upload=true, services→false, (4) POST /api/admin/vendor-onboarding creates vendor with country-aware fields, assigns vendor_role, generates invite token, returns vendor+invite+permissions+market_context, (5) Duplicate email returns 409, (6) GET /api/vendor-invite/validate/{token} validates invite token, (7) POST /api/vendor-invite/activate activates vendor with password, (8) GET /api/admin/vendor-onboarding/invites lists all invites, (9) GET /api/admin/catalog-workspace/stats returns catalog overview (products=10, services=0, taxonomy=62, supply=6, pending=8), (10) Frontend: VendorOnboardingPage has 5-step form with country selector that auto-updates phone prefix, role selector with 'Marketplace access' and 'Task-only' badges, (11) Frontend: UnifiedCatalogWorkspacePage has 5 tabs (Overview/Products/Services/Taxonomy/Supply) with stat cards, (12) Regression tests pass: /api/health, /api/admin/dormant-clients/summary, /api/admin/assignment/candidates. Email invite is MOCKED (email_sent=false).
